review_title: It's a fantastic tool that has helped my company tremendously.
description: In general, I've had a fantastic time with Seodity. As soon as I started using it, I was blown away by the wealth of information and new perspectives it offered. It not only provides an overall picture of how well my SEO is doing, but also points up specific places where I may make improvements. The software is intuitive, and the support staff is fantastic. If you're serious about search engine optimization and want the best results possible, I can't suggest Seodity enough. It's money well spent.
author: Đồng Phục H.
pros: After trying several other SEO tools, I have to say that Seodity is one of the finest I have encountered. In a short amount of time, I was able to improve my website's visibility in search engines. The time and money I have saved because to Seodity are immeasurable.The intuitive design of the UI makes it a pleasure to use in a wide variety of situations. What's more, it has top-notch support staff. The crew always got back to me quickly and helped me out if I had any inquiries or problems.Seodity provides a wide range of robust features. It's been useful for keeping tabs on rankings and analyzing the competition as well as identifying and fixing any SEO problems I may have come across. Furthermore, the reporting is informative and comprehensive. The development of my website is something I can readily monitor and respond to.Overall, Seodity is a fantastic tool that I would suggest to anybody who is interested in increasing their website's visibility in search engine results. It's a fantastic tool that has helped my company tremendously.
cons: Seodity's keyword research tools seem to need some fine-tuning, in my opinion. I enjoy that it helps me find possible keywords quickly and simply, however I think the quality of the keyword research process may be enhanced. I have no doubt that future updates to Seodity will enable it to provide even more extensive keyword research capabilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Superb Tool for the Money, Cheapest SEO Software on the Web.
description: Very Positive, it just works. The reports are quick to build and can be set to automate, the support when you need it is there with a highly capable support team.
author: Oli C.
pros: The amount of capability within the service for the money. It's a no BS platform, no fluff here just technical insight and capability.
cons: The lack of interactive or automated recommendations to improve my clients SEO. This is the only thing it lacks.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Don't start using it, company seems to be deceased
description: In the beginning it was great. From 2024 or earlier nothing worked anymore. Tried to contact many, many times, directly, support etcetera. No reply whatsoever. (Don't tell my mail isn't working... it is, we are a hostingcompany ;)
author: Dennis V.
pros: when it worked, before 2024, the UI was great, but there is no way to contact the company or support or whatsoever....
cons: the project and possibly company is dead. No way to contact them, making appointment through site is turned off... no one is answering any quesstions since january 2024. So do not start using it you will be disappointed whilest it had so much chance of succes.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Seodity is a comprehensive SEO powerhouse
description: The team behind it seems dedicated to staying ahead of the SEO game, with regular updates and new features. If you're serious about SEO and want a comprehensive platform that delivers results, Seodity is worth the investment.
author: Biju Madhavan N.
pros: I was looking for a simple easy to use, and affordable SEO tool. I've been using Seodity for over six months and I must say, it's truly an all-in-one SEO platform that does the job. Even a non-tech person like me can easily navigate through the various features. The clean layout and straightforward menu make it easy to find what you need. Competitor analysis feature is gold. It helps to understand what strategies our clients' competitors are employing and allows us to adjust the SEO strategy accordingly.
cons: Even though the interface is user-friendly, there's a bit of a learning curve especially if you're new to SEO. Thanks to the tool tips and documentation is good. Maybe adding few more How-to videos will be helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Excellent all in one tool for SEO
author: Mitchie M.
pros: It is cutting edge, uses AI and their [sensitive content hidden] even hopped on a call with me and walked me through their extensive features
cons: Nothing it has all that i need without spending a fortune on disparate tools
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very well designed SEO Tool
description: Nice and clean bit of software. Many of these tools to similar things, its the ease of use and cleanliness of the layout that sets Seodity aside from many of the others.
author: Tim C.
pros: Primarily the UI - it is very clean and prevents data overload common with this kind of tool.
cons: There is a bit of delay when clicking some of the features to run - they are running, it's just the visual indiecator to let you know they are running seems to take a while to display anything so sometimes you are left thinking 'is this doing anything?' - but it always is (just to clarify).
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: New tool, but doing a great job at a low price.
description: Really good experience overall, what features they are missing in these early days are in the pipeline, and you won't have to pay for any features you don't need under their planned pricing model.
author: Chris N.
pros: I like the competitor analysis, brings back more keywords than Ahrefs most of the time. On top of this the pricing is much more reasonable than some of the big name tools.
cons: Filtering options need some work, but customer service says this is in the pipeline.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEODity Does It
author: Jock B.
pros: It is very easy to use and I love how it offers unlimited projects and gives you an overarching view of the projects marketing.
cons: Not much that i can say I dislike yet, though it is early days.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, Easy, Accurate
description: If you're looking for an affordable budget alternative to AH and Sem, this is a good starting point. It's a great tool for finding keywords that your website is already ranking for on Google, as well as your competitor's websites. This information is essential for improving your website's SEO. Seodity makes it easy to find the most cost-effective keywords, so you can get the biggest bang for your buck.
author: Angelo R.
pros: I absolutely loved the ease of use and functionality of the Seodity software. It was so quick and easy to get started, and I was able to find the keywords my website was already ranking for on Google very easily. This is a great tool for anyone looking to improve their website's SEO.
cons: It took a couple of minutes to "think" like Seodity. The UI I'm sure will be improved as the product becomes more main stream.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome SEO tool for checking backlinks and your rank tracking
description: Great SEO tool especially if you got it on Appsumo. Just know it is very new so there may be some bugs but customer support will do their best to fix it.
author: Josh C.
pros: I like best that when you check backlinks you can easily filter the top level domains. The ranking is good especially for comparing to competitors.
cons: There were some issues at the beginning and it not saving competitors or keywords. Customer support was good about getting back to me but it took about 4-5 times of saying it was fixed before the problems were fixed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easiest SEO Tool I Have Come Across
description: We love it, because of its ease of use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Speed, Clean UI, Accuracy. Makes us want to use it every day, even if we do not need to. For the age of this tool. It's quite mature and they are doing all the right things to catch up with the competitors who are in the industry for years.
cons: We mainly use SEODity to track Website SEO Progress. Waiting to see Content Management features & Google Maps Rank Tracking. Then it will be a complete tool for us.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Unparalleled Value with Exceptional Support!
description: My journey with Seodity has been nothing short of excellent. From its robust set of features to its unbeatable price point, Seodity has proved to be a valuable asset in my SEO toolkit. The standout, however, has been the unparalleled support that has consistently exceeded my expectations. While a graphical data visualization feature would be a cherry on top, Seodity already outshines many of its pricier competitors. I'd recommend it to anyone seeking an efficient and cost-effective SEO solution.
author: Manuel M.
pros: I've been overwhelmingly satisfied with Seodity's capabilities. When it comes to the price-to-performance ratio, Seodity stands uncontested. Many other platforms on the market charge substantially more while offering the same or even lesser functionalities. The software is not only user-friendly but also comprehensive in its features. What truly sets it apart, though, is the exemplary support. The team behind Seodity is responsive, knowledgeable, and always ready to assist, making it a unique selling point in its own right.
cons: While I've had a generally positive experience with Seodity, one area of improvement would be the addition of a visual diagram feature similar to what Ahrefs offers. Such a graphical representation would provide a more intuitive insight into data and trends, enhancing the user's experience even further.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Very usefull software that helps rank higher
description: It is a software that has many functions and covers everything one needs to rank higher. It also has a SERP, so I can see what my competition does. Plus, I get weekly reports about broken links, duplicate descriptions and other important information.
author: Asterios G.
pros: I feel so happy to have the keyword rank research and the SERP. It makes my work much easier and more efficient.
cons: The user data from Google, like the ranking information, sometimes come with a delay of 2–3 days.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Closest Tool to SEMRush I Have Found
description: I am always looking for a tool to replace my expensive SEMRush subscription. Usually, they don't come close, and I end up regretting my purchase. That hasn't happened with Seodity. The numbers are on par with SEMRush, the daily rank tracker is excellent, backlink tool is useful and pre-defined shortcuts help identify easy wins with keywords. The reporting looks professional, although I don't use it as much as I could. I might finally give up my SEMRush subscription! 18 months on, my only regret is not buying a higher tier LTD when I had the chance.
author: Jamie S.
pros: Keyword estimates are similar to SEMRush Great user interface and easy to navigate Lost keywords feature is helpful for additional content ideas The presets for filtering searches help to quickly identify easy wins and keywords with good potential Integrates with GSC and GA4 Reports are professional
cons: I'm yet to try the content editor, but I look forward to this in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good SEO software
description: SEODITY is an excellent all-in-one solution for our SEO needs. While we don't have extensive SEO requirements, we also don't have a large budget for it, making SEODITY the ideal solution for us.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Seodity's most outstanding attribute is its user-friendliness. It doesn't matter if you're new to SEO or a seasoned professional; this tool is suitable for everyone. It provides an effortless way to assess the health of your website. Additionally, discovering lucrative keywords to target or monitoring your progress in this regard is effortless with Seodity's assistance.
cons: I see that you're curious about the domain grading feature on SEODITY. It's normal to have questions, especially if some domains are displaying high scores on your dashboard. Allow me to provide some clarity on the matter.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great SEO tool for beginners and more advanced users
author: Mike K.
pros: I like it because the interface is well-designed, it's straightforward and provides a lot of valuable data.
cons: It would be great if more filters for keywords and competition could be added, but it's not a significant issue for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The all-in-one SEO suite for digital agencies
description: We originally used SEODITY for keyword research for our clients, however, the onsite SEO audit is excellent and may replace Screaming Frog. I particularly like the rank tracker emails, notifying me the keyword position for clients. We can see if any drop and investigate why (perhaps the article needs updating or a competitor recently published competing content). This helps us stay on top and provided a reason to contact clients.
author: John C.
pros: I'm really impressed with SEODITY, which is such value for all the tools that a digital agency need to deliver outstanding SEO services to their clients. From finding keywords, to checking the site for mistakes (technical SEO) to monitoring backlinks. The real power for us is in the competitor research tools -- find out what your client's competitors are going (keywords and ads), do a gap analysis and create a content roadmap to get on the first page of google for that keyword.
cons: Hardly anything. If I'm nitpicking the UI for sorting the tables is a little small on my huge 4K monitor, so I have increased the size of the text to read it. Being an older user I would appreciate a high contrast version or one which uses black rather than grey for the text, as it's a bit hard to read.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Ahrefs alternative - Just needs a BETTER Website Scoring system
description: I love this for finding competitor ranking posts and keywords, to model content. For keyword rank tracking and to find competitor overlapping keywords. I wish it was easier to find these reports after they are generated. Keyword Research is pretty good also.
author: Daniel M.
pros: It has lots of great keyword and ranking insights built in, a great value for the money. Love the features and functionality. Ranked competitor page posts is a gem, showing ranked keywords and traffic.
cons: The Website Scoring system is not well defined, dont know if it is out of 300, 500 or 1,000. Most website ranking systems are out of 100. Would be nice to have a similar system to industry standards.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Value your time, use SEODITY for improve your website
description: I recently established an SEO division within our company. SEOdity appears to be a good deal to assist our division in integrating SEO to our website. Even without an SEO Specialist, our content creator and Web Developer contribute significantly to the improve our website from SEOdity analyst results.
author: Ashep R.
pros: Excellent value for the money, and virtually all of the essential software from well-known SEO apps is included. Clear and concise dashboard with up-to-date information sent via email.
cons: For a beginner, SEOdity assisted me in evaluating and analyzing competitors, as well as auditing my website and completing my personal assignment. Perhaps SEOdity can add an evaluation or create a checklist for our website in comparison to other websites that have been analyzed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to Use SEO Tool
author: Aaryan Salman Z.
pros: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is a vital part of any website’s digital marketing strategy. What I like most is SEODITY's intuitive UI and easy-to-understand insights, making it easy for beginners to improve the website's Search Engine Visibility.
cons: I feel that Seodity can improve further by making the platform more visually rich and attractive with granular data and data visualization.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best alternative to Semrush
description: Overall I like it a lot and I am using it every day. I got the lifetime deal which is fantastic.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the modern dashboard design. It also gives me pretty accurate rank tracking. I like the fact that I am able to change the search location to any city I want. Daily tracking is a great feature that I was looking for. I love the keyword suggestions. It gave many keywords that I was ranking and didn't know about.
cons: Google Maps 3-pack is missing which is pretty apparent they should add it soon. Sometimes the search volume doesn't show anything (although I can see there are enough searches on other platforms). There's a bug when I accidentally select the United States and type a keyword, it doesn't let me change the country unless I cancel it and do the process again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A tool that gets results
author: Konstantinos L.
pros: It has a very good list of functionalities that will help your SEO journey
cons: Nothing comes to my mind right now Since i can cover what i want to do
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Simple and Easy to Use. Good also for beginners
description: Tools that Seodity provide is really nice and easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is good for beginners. There is not much learning curve and easy to understand
cons: Ranking system can be confusing. But still it works.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Seodity Is My Favorite SEO Tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that Seodity is easy to use, and it's also packed full of features.
cons: I can honestly say that in my use case of the tool, I haven't come across anything that I don't like.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Awesome tools, must have!
description: Very impressed! I just wish I found it earlier in my SEO adventure!
author: Mike R.
pros: I love the way I always find great keywords with nice search volume that I can focus on to drive more traffic!
cons: Most of the features are spot on! Just get to work and use it!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
